title: Unlit Campfire Placement (RP)│未點燃的篝火放置（資源包）
description: The campfire item texture has been changed to a style without flames, in order to match the changes in Data Pack "Unlit Campfire Placement".│為了與資料包「未點燃的篝火放置」中的變更相匹配，篝火物品紋理已更改為無火焰樣式。
body:
# Introduce│介紹
- The item textures for campfires and soul campfires have been changed to a flameless style, and soul campfires will now emit souls to distinguish them.│營火和靈魂營火的物品紋理改成無火焰的樣式，靈魂營火會冒出靈魂以區分。
- This applies to the data pack [Unlit Campfire Placement](https://modrinth.com/datapack/unlit-campfire-placement) or other modules with the same functionality.│適用於資料包[Unlit Campfire Placement](https://modrinth.com/datapack/unlit-campfire-placement)或其他具有相同功能的模組。
- If you have installed [LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights), then campfires and soul campfire items will no longer produce lights.│如果你安裝了[LambDynamicLights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights)，那麼營火和靈魂營火物品將不再產生光源‎。

**Please see the gallery for the revised textures.│更改過後的紋理請參見圖庫。**
